steps.title: Recall the rectangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is found by multiplying its length by its width.

steps.title: Calculate using the given dimensions
steps.content:
With length = 4 cm and width = 2 cm, the area is:
$$A = 4 \times 2 = 8 \text{ cm}^2$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
